popularStory.headline: Biography of Reverend Raplh Wheelock
popularStory.description:
Biography of Reverend Ralph Wheelock

(1600 - 1683)

Reverend Ralph Wheelock, Puritan, educator, and founder was born in Shropshire, England in 1600. The origins of his surname can be traced back to …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend Ralph Wheelock於1600年5月14日出生在英國史洛普爾多寧頓時，他的父親Joseph John Wheelock36歲，母親Elizabeth Rogers25歲。他於1630年5月17日與Rebecca Wilkinson在英國英格蘭諾福爾可福藍普林加姆結婚。他於1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆且於1649年住在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特。他於1637年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆被列為as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts.。他去世於1684年1月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德享年83歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend Ralph Wheelock于1600年5月14日出生在英国史洛普爾多寧頓时，他的父亲Joseph John Wheelock36岁，母亲Elizabeth Rogers25岁。他于1630年5月17日与Rebecca Wilkinson在英国英格兰諾福爾可福藍普林加姆结婚。他于1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆且于1649年住在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特。他于1637年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆被列为as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts.。他去世于1684年1月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德享年83岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend Ralph Wheelock was born on 14 May 1600, in Donington, Shropshire, England, his father, Joseph John Wheelock, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Rogers, was 25. He married Rebecca Wilkinson on 17 May 1630, in Wramplingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He lived in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1637 and Worcester, Massachusetts, United States in 1649. In 1637, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 11 January 1684, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83, and was buried in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend Ralph Wheelock est né le 14 mai 1600, à Donington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Joseph John Wheelock, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Rogers, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Wilkinson le 17 mai 1630, à Wramplingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a vécu à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1637 et à Worcester, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1649. En 1637, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1684, à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend Ralph Wheelock am 14. Mai 1600 in Donington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joseph John Wheelock 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Rogers 25. Er hat am 17. Mai 1630 in Wramplingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Rebecca Wilkinson geheiratet. 1637 hat er in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1649 in Worcester, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. 1637, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Januar 1684 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Ralph Wheelock è nato il il 14 maggio 1600 nel Donington, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Joseph John Wheelock, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Rogers, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Wilkinson il 17 maggio 1630, nel Wramplingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Vissuto a Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1637 e nel Worcester, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1649. Nel 1637, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. nel Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 11 gennaio 1684, nel Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend Ralph Wheelockが1600年5月14日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアドニントンで生まれた時，父Joseph John Wheelockは36歳，母Elizabeth Rogersは25歳であった。1630年5月17日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウランプリンガムでRebecca Wilkinsonと結婚した。彼は1637年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムに，1649年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターに住んでいた。1637年，39歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムでの職業はas a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts.と記録されている。彼は1684年1月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドで83歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend Ralph Wheelock(이)가 1600년 5월 14일 영국 슈럽실르 도닝턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joseph John Wheelock(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Rogers(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1630년 5월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 램플링함에서 Rebecca Wilkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 1637년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에서, 1649년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터에서 살았다. 1637년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에서 as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts.이었다. 그는 1684년 1월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Ralph Wheelock nasceu em 14 de maio de 1600, em Donington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Joseph John Wheelock, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Rogers, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Wilkinson em 17 de maio de 1630, em Wramplingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele viveu em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1637 e em Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1649. Em 1637, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1684, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend Ralph Wheelock родился 14 мая 1600 г. в местности донингтон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Joseph John Wheelock было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Rogers, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Wilkinson 17 мая 1630 г. в местности рамплингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он жил в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1637 году и в местности ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1649 году. В 1637 году, в возрасте 39 лет,  он работал по профессии as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 11 января 1684 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend Ralph Wheelock nació el 14 de mayo de 1600, en Donington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Joseph John Wheelock, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Rogers, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Rebecca Wilkinson el 17 de mayo de 1630, en Wramplingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Vivió en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1637 y en Worcester, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1649. En 1637, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era as a puritan minister he played an active role in establishing the town of dedham insetts. en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 11 de enero de 1684, en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
